title: A Day in the Life at NCHHSTP | CDC NCHHSTP | CDC
text:
resources and initiatives. 
A Day in the Life event was created by the NCHHSTP Workforce Champions Working Group. This recurring event helps jobseekers and employees understand various career paths and roles within the Center. As part of the initiative, a panel of experienced NCHHSTP staff members come together and discuss a particular job series and share their professional journeys.
Learn more about the various general schedule (GS) job series and how to excel from the experts themselves.
